creator: gyptazy@gyptazy.ch
text:
Hey,

we needed to upgrade to Go 1.22 which is (or at least should be) included in FBSD 14's pkg tree. According to https://www.freshports.org/lang/go122 this has lastly been  updated on 2024-02-20 21:08:00. So, this is already a few days old.

You can also find the built binary artifact here: https://pkg.freebsd.org/FreeBSD:14:amd64/latest/All/go122-1.22.0.pkg 

Afterwards, the pkg metadata should get updated but they still don't provide any reference to this package.

Cheers,
gyptazy
